g.title: permission.usr_work_ou_map:usr->actor.usr:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (usr) REFERENCES actor.usr(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED

g.title: permission.usr_work_ou_map:work_ou->actor.org_unit:id
g.text: FOREIGN KEY (work_ou) REFERENCES actor.org_unit(id) ON DELETE CASCADE DEFERRABLE INITIALLY DEFERRED
